title: Crispy Sweet Indian Oats Bars
description: A quick, post-workout snack that blends Kashmiri flavors with crispy oats, nuts, and a touch of natural sweetness.

ingredients.name: optional: stevia or monk fruit sweetener, to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and line an 8‑inch square baking pan with parchment paper.
In a medium saucepan, melt the ghee over low heat. Add the jaggery, stirring until it dissolves into a glossy syrup.

Remove the pan from heat and quickly fold in oats, chopped nuts, dried apricots, dates, crushed cardamom seeds, sesame seeds, and a pinch of salt. Mix until the mixture is evenly coated and slightly sticky.
Press the mixture firmly into the prepared pan, ensuring a uniform thickness of about ½ inch. Use the back of a spoon or a flat spatula to level the surface.
Place the pan in the preheated oven and bake for 12–15 minutes, or until the bars are golden brown and crisp around the edges.

Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before cutting into 8 equal bars. If desired, sprinkle a light dusting of stevia or a few drops of monk fruit sweetener over the top for extra sweetness without added sugar.
Store the bars in an airtight container at room temperature for up to a week or freeze for longer storage.
